summary:
\(\boxed{\text{Safety assessment}}\) In phase 1 clinical trials, the primary focus is evaluating the safety profile of new drugs by monitoring initial dosages and observing participant responses. These studies do not yet assess therapeutic effectiveness but concentrate on establishing dosage ranges and detecting possible harmful effects. 

This captures both core aspects you highlighted while keeping it succinct within two sentences as requested.
